summary: Scaffold Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind, ESLint, App Router

resolution.note: Next.js 16.2.4 scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind v4, ESLint, App Router, src-dir, @/* alias. Core deps (openai, pg, @clerk/nextjs, stripe, svix) and @types/pg installed. type-check passes clean. .env.example committed.
